text: AWS Backup @ st @ it e Backup Plans - frequency, window, lifecycle, vault, region copy ® Resources - What resources are backed up e Vaults - Backup destination (container) - assign KMS key for encryption e Vault Lock - write-once, read-many (WORM), 72 hour cool off, then even AWS can't delete ® On-Demand - manual backups created as needed * PITR - Point in time recovery
